samples.xml_description:
<module id="alu">
    <description>ALU for a 32-bit MIPS-ISA CPU.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="a" width_description="[31:0]">A 32-bit input operand.</input>
        <input id="b" width_description="[31:0]">A 32-bit input operand.</input>
        <input id="aluc" width_description="[5:0]">Control signal for selecting the operation.</input>
        <output id="r" width_description="[31:0]">Result of the operation.</output>
        <output id="zero">Indicates if the result is zero.</output>
        <output id="carry">Indicates if a carry occurred.</output>
        <output id="negative">Indicates if the result is negative.</output>
        <output id="overflow">Indicates if an overflow occurred.</output>
        <output id="flag">General flag output, typically for comparison results like SLT and SLTU.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <!-- Add your FSM states or named constants here if needed -->
        <state>ADD       = 6'b100000;</state>
        <state>ADDU      = 6'b100001;</state>
        <state>SUB       = 6'b100010;</state>
        <state>SUBU      = 6'b100011;</state>
        <state>AND       = 6'b100100;</state>
        <state>OR        = 6'b100101;</state>
        <state>XOR       = 6'b100110;</state>
        <state>NOR       = 6'b100111;</state>
        <state>SLT       = 6'b101010;</state>
        <state>SLTU      = 6'b101011;</state>
        <state>SLL       = 6'b000000;</state>
        <state>SRL       = 6'b000010;</state>
        <state>SRA       = 6'b000011;</state>
        <state>SLLV      = 6'b000100;</state>
        <state>SRLV      = 6'b000110;</state>
        <state>SRAV      = 6'b000111;</state>
        <state>LUI       = 6'b001111;</state>
    </parameter_description>
    
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        // Define your logic here
        reg [31:0] res; 
        wire signed [31:0] a_signed = a;
        wire signed [31:0] b_signed = b;
        
        assign r[31:0] = res[31:0];
        assign flag = (aluc == SLT || aluc == SLTU)? 1'b1 : 1'bz;
        assign zero = ~|r ? 1'b1 : 1'b0;
        assign negative = r[31]; // Negative if MSB is 1
        assign overflow = ((aluc == ADD && (a[31] & b[31] & !res[31])) | (aluc == SUB && !a[31] & b[31] & res[31]));
        assign carry = (aluc == ADD && (a[31] & b[31])) | (aluc == SUB && (!a[31] & b[31]));
        
        
        always @(*) begin
            case(aluc)
                ADD:     res <= a + b;
                ADDU:    res <= a + b;
                SUB:     res <= a - b;
                SUBU:    res <= a - b;
                AND:     res <= a & b;
                OR:      res <= a | b;
                XOR:     res <= a ^ b;
                NOR:     res <= ~(a | b);
                SLT:     res <= (a_signed < b_signed) ? 32'd1 : 32'd0;
                SLTU:    res <= (a < b) ? 32'd1 : 32'd0;
                SLL:     res <= $signed(b) <<< a;
                SRL:     res <= $unsigned(b) >>> a;
                SRA:     res <= b_signed >>> a;
                SLLV:    res <= $signed(b) <<< a[4:0];
                SRLV:    res <= $unsigned(b) >>> a[4:0];
                SRAV:    res <= b_signed >>> a[4:0];
                LUI:     res <= {a[31:16], 16'h0000};
                default: res <= 32'hzzzz_zzzz;
            endcase
        end
        
    </logic_description>
    
    <implementation>TODO</implementation>
</module>
